headline.text: L2 FFS held for *ATP failure* — Level 2 cleaning completed and line released within 3 hours.

summary: One sanitation hold at L2 resolved after ATP retest passed. L3 quality flags include dirty molds returned to ML4 magazine and yellow trays mixed with white on Truffle Line.

holds.title: FFS line held for ATP failure
holds.summary: ATP tests failed on FFS line at 04:13; product removed, Level 2 cleaning performed, visual and ATP retest passed at 06:41.
holds.status: Resolved — line released and running at 07:03.

quality.title: Yellow floor trays mixed with white product trays
quality.summary: Yellow interlocking floor trays found alongside white product trays on Truffle Line; potential segregation or cross-contact concern.
quality.status: Open — no disposition or corrective action reported.

quality.title: ML4 mold jams caused by dirty molds in magazine
quality.summary: Multiple mold jams at cold stamp section traced to molds with chocolate residue inside; molds appear to have been returned to magazine dirty after prior shift.
quality.status: Open — root cause identified as cleaning gap, no corrective action reported yet.

sanitation.title: FFS ATP failure
sanitation.summary: ATP tests did not pass on FFS line; product emptied and Level 2 cleaning initiated; retest passed visual and ATP verification.
sanitation.status: Resolved — cleaning verified and line released at 07:03.

opportunities.text: Consider reviewing ATP sampling points and pre-startup cleaning verification protocols on FFS line — based on today's ATP failure requiring Level 2 re-clean.
Consider adding mold cleanliness inspection to ML4 shutdown checklist — based on multiple mold jams traced to chocolate-contaminated molds returned to magazine.
Review tray color-coding and segregation protocols on Truffle Line — based on yellow floor trays found mixed with white product trays.
